name: Platform discussions
description: Step up your platform skills. Check out common platform questions here and learn from other’s expertise & experience.

name: Announcements
description: Be the first to know about new, upcoming, and important announcements and features updates directly from the monday.com team.

name: New Features
description: Be the first to know about the latest platform updates and uncover new features that will change the way you work.

name: Feature requests
description: Submit your product ideas and feedback, tell us about your dream features, and vote to be heard!

name: Community events
description: Mark your calendars! All the events you need to know about can be found here.

name: monday apps & integrations
description: Search for answers or ask a question about using monday.com apps and integrations.

name: Special workflows & use cases
description: Take your process to the next level. Discover how to master complex workflows and find unique solutions for your needs.

name: monday CRM
description: Discuss and uncover the abilities of monday CRM and be the first to learn about the latest updates straight from the team!

name: monday Apps & Developers
description:
For discussions and questions about developing apps on monday.com, including the monday apps framework,
GraphQL API, SDK and general programming questions.

name: Feature Requests - API and Apps Framework
description: Do you have an idea for a new feature for our Apps Framework or GraphQL API? Add and vote for them here!

name: Share your monday apps!
description: This is where you can share apps with the community and see the apps other developers have built!

name: Announcements
description: Follow this section! It’s a place for the monday dev success team to put feature announcements, helpful examples, and tips.

name: Hire an Expert
description: If you are looking for a more complicated workflow setup, support and guidance in your language or custom-built integrations, you can find an expert to help you here!

name: monday dev
description: This is the place to discuss the monday dev product and share ideas on how to plan, execute, and manage your entire product lifecycle.

name: Deutschsprachige Community
description: Willkommen in der deutschsprachigen Community! Die Community ist Deine Plattform, wo Du Dich mit anderen Nutzern und monday.com Partnern austauschen kannst. Hier findest Du auch Neuigkeiten und anstehende Events in der Region.

name: Nonprofits
description: Welcome to the monday.com community where you can ask questions on your workflow and share successes with fellow nonprofit users!
